creator: freebsd.org@alexandrews.me.uk
text: I recently downloaded the latest (v11.1) FreeBSD USB release installation image and burnt it to a USB stick.  However, my Intel D945-GCLF2 based PC completely ignores booting from the USB stick when attached (but happily boots other USB sticks), and I suspect that it is because the USB image uses the GPT schema.  I believe previous versions of FreeBSD (eg. 10.4) used to provide both MBR and GPT USB installation images so an MBR version is needed for v11.1 (and future versions) of FreeBSD.
